_meta.purpose: Lop dinh huong noi dung (category/subcategory) NAM TREN Story DNA Engine v1.8.1. Khong thay the conflict catalog cu.
_meta.selection_rule: eligible = all_candidates - incompatible - cooldown_blocked - daily_cap_blocked. CHI SAU DO moi cong trong so affinity trong tap con hop le. TUYET DOI khong chon affinity truoc roi nhet xuong.
_meta.note_affinity: reveal_affinity/justice_affinity la GOI Y, khong phai required. Cooldown v1.8.1 luon THANG affinity.
_meta.note_validator: external_public_validator CHI xuat hien o 6 sub thuc su hop (stolen valor, service record, cong dong vinh danh...). Van bi cap <=25%/ngay boi cooldown v1.8.1. Khong duoc mo rong tuy tien.

global_rules.R-01_subcategory_exact_cooldown: Khong lap cung subcategory trong 20 bai gan nhat cua cung page.
global_rules.R-02_cross_page_global_cooldown: Khong hard block toan he thong; chi soft penalty trong 5 bai gan nhat toan network.
global_rules.R-03_category_streak: Page chuyen category toi da 3 bai lien tiep cung category; bai thu 4 phai lay category phu neu co.
global_rules.R-04_priority_mix: Toan network giai doan dau: P0 ~64%, P1 ~30%, P2 ~6%.
global_rules.R-05_reveal_diversity: Subcategory affinity chi la uu tien; van tuan family cooldown v1.8.1.
global_rules.R-06_no_villain_monoculture: Khong de >40% bai trong 20 bai gan nhat co villain la adult child/in-law.
global_rules.R-07_no_wealth_shortcut: Hidden wealth/inheritance reveal theo cap cu; CAT03 khong dong nghia hidden wealth.
global_rules.R-08_pet_loss_cap: CAT08: death/loss ending toi da 20% rolling 20.
global_rules.R-09_romance_scam_balance: CAT04: scam toi da 50%; con lai phai la love/companionship that.
global_rules.R-10_veteran_validator_cap: CAT09 van ap external_public_validator + public_recognition <=25% theo ngay.

categories.description: Tình yêu, hy sinh, khoảng cách thế hệ và quyền được hiện diện trong đời cháu.

subcategories.conflict_premise: A grandparent raised a grandchild but the sacrifice is denied.
An adult child cuts off contact with the grandchildren after a divorce or conflict.
The grandparent quietly paid tuition or sold assets, but someone else takes the credit.
An adult grandchild comes back to care for or defend the grandparent.
Treated as an unpaid babysitter with no respect for boundaries.
A grandchild finds letters, a diary or an object that changes how the family sees the grandparent.
Someone with no blood tie becomes the real grandparent.
The grandchild is the only one who stands up for the grandparent.

categories.name_vi: Chăm sóc người thân già và xung đột anh chị em
categories.description: Ai thực sự ở lại khi cha mẹ già yếu, và cái giá vô hình của người chăm sóc.

subcategories.conflict_premise: One child gave years of care; the others appear only when assets are divided.

subcategories.name_en: Long-Distance Sibling Thinks Money Is Enough
subcategories.conflict_premise: A distant sibling sends money but does not understand the daily burden.

subcategories.name_en: Caregiver Accused of Living Off Parent
subcategories.conflict_premise: The caregiver is accused of freeloading or manipulating the parent's assets.
Siblings fight over who decides the parent's care and treatment.
A hired caregiver understands the elder better than the biological children.
Memory loss brings an old promise or secret to the surface.
A grandchild must choose between their own future and caring for a grandparent.
The parent promised the house to the caregiver, triggering a fight with siblings.

categories.name_vi: Nhà cửa, thừa kế và quyền sống trong nhà mình
categories.description: Ngôi nhà không chỉ là tài sản; đó là ký ức, quyền tự chủ và phẩm giá.

subcategories.name_en: Children Try to Sell the Parent's Home
subcategories.conflict_premise: Adult children push to sell the home, claiming the parent can no longer live alone.
Old paperwork reveals ownership or a clause nobody knew about.

subcategories.name_en: Sibling Renovates Then Claims the House
subcategories.conflict_premise: One sibling renovates, then uses the cost to claim ownership.
The family pushes an elder out of the home although they can still decide for themselves.
A relative uses power of attorney to control money and property.
A house thought worthless turns out to carry local or community history.

subcategories.name_en: House Turned Into Rental While Owner Is Away
subcategories.conflict_premise: The home is rented or listed while the owner is hospitalized or away.

subcategories.name_en: Chosen Heir Instead of Blood Relative
subcategories.conflict_premise: A caregiver or neighbor inherits because they were the one who stayed.

categories.name_vi: Tình yêu tuổi xế chiều, góa bụa và lừa đảo tình cảm
categories.description: Quyền được yêu lại, nỗi sợ phản bội ký ức người cũ và ranh giới giữa tình yêu thật với lợi dụng.

subcategories.conflict_premise: Adult children oppose a new love, fearing assets or the memory of the late parent.
A first love reappears after decades.

subcategories.name_en: Romance Scam Detected by a Small Detail
subcategories.conflict_premise: The character spots the scam themselves through one small inconsistency.
Two residents fall in love but hide it, fearing judgment.
A late wedding exposes the family's greed over inheritance.
The character feels guilty about loving again after a spouse's death.

subcategories.name_en: Online Connection Turns Into Investment Pressure
subcategories.conflict_premise: An online relationship turns into pressure to lend or invest.
A long friendship becomes love after both have lost their partners.

categories.name_vi: Bí mật gia đình, di sản và lịch sử bị mất
categories.description: Một vật chứng nhỏ có thể thay đổi cách cả gia đình hiểu về quá khứ.

subcategories.conflict_premise: Old letters reveal a hidden child or relationship.

subcategories.name_en: Family Recipe Was Stolen or Misattributed
subcategories.conflict_premise: A famous recipe belongs to someone erased from the family story.

subcategories.name_en: Medal or Service Record Tells Another Story
subcategories.conflict_premise: A medal or service record shows a truth different from the family's version.

subcategories.name_en: Bible, Journal or Ledger Changes the Inheritance
subcategories.conflict_premise: Notes in a book, journal or ledger clarify an old promise.

subcategories.name_en: Cassette or Voicemail From the Dead
subcategories.conflict_premise: A recording left behind carries an explanation or a late apology.
Genealogy or DNA reveals a hidden identity, relation or history.
A parent who could not write quietly recorded their life in sound or pictures.
A lost object comes back, bringing an untold story with it.

categories.name_vi: Phân biệt tuổi tác nơi làm việc và sự nghiệp thứ hai
categories.description: Kinh nghiệm bị coi thường, quyền được làm việc và giá trị con người ngoài tuổi tác.

subcategories.conflict_premise: An older worker is asked to train the person who will replace them.
Forced out just before benefits or seniority vest.
A skill dismissed as obsolete saves the system or the customer.

subcategories.name_en: Idea Stolen by a Younger Coworker
subcategories.conflict_premise: A younger colleague takes credit for the older worker's idea.
Returning to work after years of caregiving or widowhood.
Rejected by employers, the character starts their own small operation.
A customer trusts experience over a younger manager's polish.
After the company realizes their value, the character declines to return.

categories.name_vi: Lừa đảo tài chính và người thân lợi dụng
categories.description: Sự phản bội tiền bạc thường đau nhất khi đến từ người thân hoặc người được tin tưởng.

subcategories.conflict_premise: A scammer poses as a grandchild in trouble to demand emergency money.
A fake support or agency call gets access to accounts.
Someone exploits community goodwill with a fake fundraiser.
An adult child uses a parent's card or account.
A caregiver exploits trust to take assets.
A new friend or partner pushes a can't-lose investment.
A signature or power of attorney is forged or used beyond its scope.

subcategories.name_en: Family Discovers the Scam but Blames the Victim
subcategories.conflict_premise: The victim is shamed by their own family instead of protected.

categories.name_vi: Thú cưng, cô đơn và cơ hội sống lại
categories.description: Thú cưng là gia đình, mục đích sống và đôi khi là cầu nối cuối cùng với cộng đồng.

subcategories.name_en: Family Wants to Surrender the Pet
subcategories.conflict_premise: The children want to give away the pet when the elder is hospitalized or moving.
The pet leads a neighbor to an owner in danger.

subcategories.name_en: Inherited Pet From a Late Spouse
subcategories.conflict_premise: Caring for a late partner's animal restores a sense of purpose.

subcategories.name_en: Veteran and Rescue Animal Heal Together
subcategories.conflict_premise: A veteran and a rescue animal recover together.
The elder must choose between housing and their only companion.

subcategories.name_en: Nobody Wants the Pet During Inheritance Fight
subcategories.conflict_premise: The family fights over assets but abandons the animal.

subcategories.name_en: Retiree Finds Community Through Rescue Work
subcategories.conflict_premise: Rescue work pulls a retiree out of isolation.

subcategories.name_en: Pet Leads to a Hidden Memory
subcategories.conflict_premise: The animal uncovers a letter or object that reconnects family memory.

categories.name_vi: Cựu chiến binh và sự phục vụ bị lãng quên
categories.description: Phẩm giá, hậu quả lâu dài của phục vụ và khoảng cách giữa biểu tượng với cách xã hội đối xử thật.

subcategories.conflict_premise: Benefits or records are denied through an administrative error.
The family treats the service history as old news or a burden.
Financial pressure pushes the veteran into an impossible choice.
A service dog or an old comrade helps close an open wound.
Someone else takes credit for, or misreports, a past act.
The community misreads the veteran's behavior without knowing the context.

subcategories.name_en: Veteran Helps a Younger Person Quietly
subcategories.conflict_premise: The character helps a young person without seeking recognition.
Invited to be honored, the character chooses a more private act instead.

categories.name_vi: Hàng xóm, cộng đồng đức tin và gia đình được lựa chọn
categories.description: Gia đình không chỉ là huyết thống; người ở lại đôi khi là hàng xóm, người đưa thư hoặc cộng đồng.

subcategories.name_en: Neighbor Cares When Children Live Far Away
subcategories.conflict_premise: A neighbor becomes the real caregiver when the children live far away.

subcategories.name_en: Mail Carrier Notices Something Is Wrong
subcategories.conflict_premise: A mail carrier notices an elder is missing or in trouble.
A quiet donation or sacrifice is misunderstood.

subcategories.name_en: Trailer Park or Neighborhood Faces Displacement
subcategories.conflict_premise: A community fights being bought out or displaced.
A friend or neighbor is named because they were the one who stayed.
An old rumor made the whole town misread one person.

subcategories.name_en: Community Meal Reveals an Old Bond
subcategories.conflict_premise: A meal, festival or fair brings back an old secret or friendship.

subcategories.name_en: Chosen Family at the End of Life
subcategories.conflict_premise: Friends or community become the real family at the end of life.

categories.name_vi: Nghỉ hưu thất bại và tái tạo cuộc đời
categories.description: Nghỉ hưu không phải kết thúc; đôi khi là cú rơi tài chính, đôi khi là cơ hội sống lại.

subcategories.name_en: Returns to Work for Basic Expenses
subcategories.conflict_premise: Rising costs force a return to work.
A retirement fund is mismanaged or used by a relative.

subcategories.name_en: Starts a Small Business From a Hobby
subcategories.conflict_premise: A craft or hobby becomes income and community.
Returning to work is about purpose, not money.
The ideal retirement plan fails and the couple must start over.
Learning a new skill to keep a job or stay connected.

subcategories.name_en: Hides Night Work From Adult Children
subcategories.conflict_premise: A parent hides a second job out of shame or to protect the children.
Trading old status for smaller but meaningful work.

categories.name_en: Marriage Betrayal, In-Laws & Adult Family Conflict
categories.name_vi: Phản bội hôn nhân, nhà chồng/nhà vợ và xung đột gia đình trưởng thành
categories.description: Drama gia đình trưởng thành, nhưng phải có chiều sâu và hậu quả thật thay vì chỉ trả đũa.

subcategories.conflict_premise: Betrayal after decades of marriage, tangled with assets and reputation.
Adult children are pulled into the parents' conflict and forced to choose.

subcategories.name_en: Bride or Groom Humiliated by In-Laws
subcategories.conflict_premise: A new family member is humiliated over class, age or past.
Illness or caregiving exposes a long-hidden truth about the marriage.
A debt or a second life has been hidden for years.
An in-law or child is pushed out of the family business.
A holiday gathering is where words or evidence break years of silence.
The character has a chance at revenge but chooses to leave with dignity.
